name: TI-RADS (Thyroid Imaging Reporting and Data System)
description: TI-RADS classification template for thyroid nodule assessment on ultrasound

findings.technique: High-resolution ultrasound of the thyroid performed using [linear transducer, X-MHz]. Gray-scale and color Doppler images obtained.
findings.comparison: Comparison made with [prior US / prior FNA] from [date].

sections.name: Composition
sections.content: Nodule composition: [cystic / spongiform / solid or nearly solid / mixed cystic and solid].

sections.name: Echogenicity
sections.content: Echogenicity: [anechoic / hyperechoic / isoechoic / hypoechoic / very hypoechoic].

sections.name: Echogenic Foci
sections.content: Echogenic foci: [none / large comet-tail artifacts / peripheral calcification / macrocalcification / punctate echogenic foci].

sections.name: Doppler
sections.content: Vascularity: [no internal vascularity / peripheral vascularity / internal vascularity].

impression:
1. TI-RADS [X]: [category description]
2. [Location] nodule measuring [X]cm
3. Composition: [X]. Echogenicity: [X]. Shape: [X]. Margins: [X]. Foci: [X]
4. FNA recommended: [Yes / No] based on size threshold of [X]cm
5. [Follow-up recommended in X months / Biopsy recommended]
author: RadReport Templates
